---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

## Internships

1.  Firm DroneTech Savunma Sanayi A.Ş., position intern, year 2025

2.  Firm TAI, position Candidate Engineer, year 2025-2026

# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies
1.Football
2.Video Games (counter strike, ea fc etc.)
3.Tv Shows and Movies
4.Aviation Simulations

## Curriculum Vitae

You can download my CV here:

[Download my CV](M.EnesBüyükertaşCV-eng.pdf)
